assertions.summary: Canonical company-scoped runtime-policy PUT on MOCK returned the published snapshot fields, and the admin metrics surface mirrored the canonical snapshot immediately afterward.

steps.action: PUT /api/v1/companies/1/tenant-runtime/policy as validation.superadmin@example.com bound to SKE
steps.observed: status 200; payload={'companyCode': 'MOCK', 'state': 'ACTIVE', 'reasonCode': 'LIVE_BASELINE', 'auditChainId': 'e315e32e-7ac4-4dcf-9a65-46a157f84402', 'updatedAt': 1773545606.5454164, 'maxConcurrentRequests': 17, 'maxRequestsPerMinute': 117, 'maxActiveUsers': 27, 'metrics': {'totalRequests': 1, 'rejectedRequests': 0, 'errorResponses': 0, 'inFlightRequests': 1, 'minuteRequestCount': 0, 'minuteRejectedCount': 0, 'activeUsers': 6}}

steps.expected: Metrics map hold state/reason/limits and auditChainId->policyReference, updatedAt->policyUpdatedAt.
steps.observed: status 200; payload={'companyCode': 'MOCK', 'holdState': 'ACTIVE', 'holdReason': 'LIVE_BASELINE', 'maxActiveUsers': 27, 'maxRequestsPerMinute': 117, 'maxConcurrentRequests': 17, 'enabledUsers': 6, 'totalUsers': 6, 'requestsThisMinute': 1, 'blockedThisMinute': 0, 'inFlightRequests': 1, 'policyReference': 'e315e32e-7ac4-4dcf-9a65-46a157f84402', 'policyUpdatedAt': 1773545606.5454164}; metrics_match=True

assertions.summary: Non-super-admin attempts against same-tenant, foreign-target, and unknown-target canonical company paths were denied without persisting policy changes.

steps.observed: status 403; error=('AUTH_004', 'Access denied', None)

steps.action: PUT /api/v1/companies/2/tenant-runtime/policy as validation.admin@example.com bound to MOCK
steps.observed: status 403; error=('AUTH_004', 'Access denied', None)
status 403; error=('AUTH_004', 'Access denied', None)

steps.action: Re-read tenant-runtime metrics after denied attempts
steps.expected: MOCK and RIVAL policies remain unchanged.
steps.observed: MOCK=('ACTIVE', 'LIVE_BASELINE', 17, 117, 27, 'e315e32e-7ac4-4dcf-9a65-46a157f84402', 1773545606.5454164); RIVAL=('ACTIVE', 'POLICY_ACTIVE', 200, 5000, 500, 'bootstrap', None); unchanged=True

assertions.summary: The stale admin runtime-policy writer is retired in the live API: the old endpoint returned 404 and left the canonical MOCK policy unchanged.

steps.observed: status 404; body={'type': 'about:blank', 'title': 'Not Found', 'status': 404, 'detail': 'No static resource api/v1/admin/tenant-runtime/policy.', 'instance': '/api/v1/admin/tenant-runtime/policy', 'properties': None}

steps.action: GET /api/v1/admin/tenant-runtime/metrics for MOCK after retired writer probe
steps.observed: payload={'companyCode': 'MOCK', 'holdState': 'ACTIVE', 'holdReason': 'LIVE_BASELINE', 'maxActiveUsers': 27, 'maxRequestsPerMinute': 117, 'maxConcurrentRequests': 17, 'enabledUsers': 6, 'totalUsers': 6, 'requestsThisMinute': 3, 'blockedThisMinute': 0, 'inFlightRequests': 1, 'policyReference': 'e315e32e-7ac4-4dcf-9a65-46a157f84402', 'policyUpdatedAt': 1773545606.5454164}

assertions.summary: Empty, reason-only, invalid-holdState, and non-positive quota payloads all failed closed with 400 responses and no stored-policy drift.

steps.observed: status 400; error=('VAL_001', 'Runtime policy mutation payload is required', None)
status 400; error=('VAL_001', 'Runtime policy mutation payload is required', None)
status 400; error=('VAL_001', 'Unsupported runtime holdState: PAUSED', None)
status 400; error=('VAL_001', 'Validation failed: maxConcurrentRequests maxConcurrentRequests must be at least 1', None)
status 400; error=('VAL_001', 'Validation failed: maxRequestsPerMinute maxRequestsPerMinute must be at least 1', None)
status 400; error=('VAL_001', 'Validation failed: maxActiveUsers maxActiveUsers must be at least 1', None)

steps.action: Compare metrics before and after invalid canonical writes
steps.expected: Stored policy and policyReference remain unchanged.

assertions.summary: The next same-node authenticated auth request was denied immediately after a canonical BLOCKED write.

steps.observed: status 200; payload={'companyCode': 'MOCK', 'state': 'BLOCKED', 'reasonCode': 'ABUSE_INCIDENT', 'auditChainId': '58fc5527-1882-404c-a781-e941edc53a84', 'updatedAt': 1773545606.9700642, 'maxConcurrentRequests': 50, 'maxRequestsPerMinute': 5000, 'maxActiveUsers': 500, 'metrics': {'totalRequests': 15, 'rejectedRequests': 0, 'errorResponses': 6, 'inFlightRequests': 1, 'minuteRequestCount': 5, 'minuteRejectedCount': 0, 'activeUsers': 6}}

steps.action: GET /api/v1/auth/me with the pre-block MOCK token
steps.observed: status 403; error=('TENANT_BLOCKED', 'Tenant is currently blocked', 'ABUSE_INCIDENT')

assertions.summary: The same previously denied /api/v1/auth/me request succeeded again immediately after canonical recovery to ACTIVE.

steps.action: PUT canonical recovery write on MOCK
steps.observed: status 200; body={'success': True, 'message': 'Company tenant runtime policy updated', 'data': {'companyCode': 'MOCK', 'state': 'ACTIVE', 'reasonCode': 'RECOVERY_COMPLETE', 'auditChainId': 'ecd5a811-9abc-4c8a-9ea8-932bc45e029e', 'updatedAt': 1773545607.015083, 'maxConcurrentRequests': 50, 'maxRequestsPerMinute': 5000, 'maxActiveUsers': 500, 'metrics': {'totalRequests': 16, 'rejectedRequests': 2, 'errorResponses': 6, 'inFlightRequests': 1, 'minuteRequestCount': 5, 'minuteRejectedCount': 2, 'activeUsers': 6}}, 'timestamp': 1773545607.019631}

steps.action: GET /api/v1/auth/me again with the same token
steps.observed: status 200; body={'success': True, 'data': {'email': 'validation.admin@example.com', 'displayName': 'Validation Admin', 'companyCode': 'MOCK', 'mfaEnabled': False, 'mustChangePassword': False, 'roles': ['ROLE_ACCOUNTING', 'ROLE_ADMIN', 'ROLE_SALES'], 'permissions': ['dispatch.confirm', 'factory.dispatch', 'payroll.run', 'portal:accounting', 'portal:dealer', 'portal:factory', 'portal:sales'], 'companyId': 'MOCK'}, 'timestamp': 1773545607.033503}

assertions.summary: Auth login, refresh, and authenticated runtime requests followed the canonical blocked/hold/quota semantics after canonical writes.

steps.observed: status 403; error=('TENANT_BLOCKED', 'Tenant is currently blocked', 'ABUSE_INCIDENT')
status 423; error=('TENANT_ON_HOLD', 'Tenant is currently on hold', 'COMPLIANCE_REVIEW')
status 429; error=('TENANT_ACTIVE_USER_QUOTA_EXCEEDED', 'Tenant active-user quota exceeded', 'MAX_USERS_LIVE')

assertions.summary: Default tenant-runtime metrics for RIVAL matched the canonical ACTIVE/POLICY_ACTIVE bootstrap defaults before any live mutation.

steps.observed: status 200; payload={'companyCode': 'RIVAL', 'holdState': 'ACTIVE', 'holdReason': 'POLICY_ACTIVE', 'maxActiveUsers': 500, 'maxRequestsPerMinute': 5000, 'maxConcurrentRequests': 200, 'enabledUsers': 2, 'totalUsers': 2, 'requestsThisMinute': 1, 'blockedThisMinute': 0, 'inFlightRequests': 1, 'policyReference': 'bootstrap', 'policyUpdatedAt': None}

assertions.summary: A non-member SKE-bound superadmin session could block and recover the RIVAL tenant through the canonical company path, while the non-super-admin RIVAL admin recovery attempt stayed denied and RIVAL remained blocked until the superadmin recovered it.

steps.action: PUT /api/v1/companies/2/tenant-runtime/policy as validation.superadmin@example.com bound to SKE
steps.expected: Cross-tenant canonical write succeeds for the non-member superadmin.
steps.observed: status 200; body={'success': True, 'message': 'Company tenant runtime policy updated', 'data': {'companyCode': 'RIVAL', 'state': 'BLOCKED', 'reasonCode': 'RIVAL_CONTAINMENT', 'auditChainId': '26197a6a-71cc-4648-9292-2eafb48270da', 'updatedAt': 1773545661.748794, 'maxConcurrentRequests': 50, 'maxRequestsPerMinute': 5000, 'maxActiveUsers': 500, 'metrics': {'totalRequests': 5, 'rejectedRequests': 1, 'errorResponses': 0, 'inFlightRequests': 1, 'minuteRequestCount': 2, 'minuteRejectedCount': 1, 'activeUsers': 2}}, 'timestamp': 1773545661.7517061}

steps.expected: Non-super-admin recovery attempt is denied and does not persist.
steps.observed: status 403; body={'success': False, 'message': 'Access denied', 'data': {'traceId': 'e6132dc7-2823-4993-a96c-3c69a3ee51e1', 'code': 'AUTH_004', 'message': 'Access denied'}, 'timestamp': 1773545661.7622063}

steps.action: POST /api/v1/auth/login for validation.rival.admin@example.com while RIVAL is still blocked
steps.expected: Blocked tenant remains denied after the failed non-super-admin recovery attempt.
steps.observed: status 403; body={'success': False, 'message': 'Tenant is currently blocked', 'data': {'traceId': 'e07b3fb1-4f5b-4306-8453-69462872ea40', 'auditChainId': '26197a6a-71cc-4648-9292-2eafb48270da', 'reason': 'TENANT_BLOCKED', 'limitValue': 'ACTIVE', 'code': 'TENANT_BLOCKED', 'tenantReasonCode': 'RIVAL_CONTAINMENT', 'observedValue': 'BLOCKED', 'message': 'Tenant is currently blocked', 'limitType': 'TENANT_STATE'}, 'timestamp': 1773545661.8343122}

steps.action: Recover RIVAL through the canonical company path using the SKE-bound superadmin session
steps.expected: Recovery succeeds and RIVAL becomes active again.
steps.observed: status 200; body={'success': True, 'message': 'Company tenant runtime policy updated', 'data': {'companyCode': 'RIVAL', 'state': 'ACTIVE', 'reasonCode': 'RECOVERY_COMPLETE', 'auditChainId': 'a31850ab-96f3-4e4a-ad76-21cae1e2d364', 'updatedAt': 1773545661.8450086, 'maxConcurrentRequests': 50, 'maxRequestsPerMinute': 5000, 'maxActiveUsers': 500, 'metrics': {'totalRequests': 6, 'rejectedRequests': 2, 'errorResponses': 0, 'inFlightRequests': 1, 'minuteRequestCount': 0, 'minuteRejectedCount': 1, 'activeUsers': 2}}, 'timestamp': 1773545661.8476455}

steps.expected: RIVAL login and metrics succeed again with ACTIVE holdState.
steps.observed: status {'login': 200, 'metrics': 200}; body={'login': {'tokenType': 'Bearer', 'accessToken': '<redacted>', 'refreshToken': '<redacted>', 'expiresIn': 900, 'companyCode': 'RIVAL', 'displayName': 'Rival Validation Admin', 'mustChangePassword': False}, 'metrics': {'success': True, 'message': 'Tenant runtime metrics', 'data': {'companyCode': 'RIVAL', 'holdState': 'ACTIVE', 'holdReason': 'RECOVERY_COMPLETE', 'maxActiveUsers': 500, 'maxRequestsPerMinute': 5000, 'maxConcurrentRequests': 50, 'enabledUsers': 2, 'totalUsers': 2, 'requestsThisMinute': 1, 'blockedThisMinute': 1, 'inFlightRequests': 1, 'policyReference': 'a31850ab-96f3-4e4a-ad76-21cae1e2d364', 'policyUpdatedAt': 1773545661.8450086}, 'timestamp': 1773545661.938751}}
